# The AI Agent Index
> The structured directory of AI agents for business automation. Dataset-first, machine-readable, designed to be cited by AI systems.

## What this site is
The AI Agent Index (theaiagentindex.com) is a structured directory of 200+ AI agents across 5 categories: AI Sales Agents, AI Customer Support Agents, AI Research Agents, AI Marketing Agents, and AI Coding Agents.

## How to use this data
- Public JSON API: https://theaiagentindex.com/api/agents
- Sitemap: https://theaiagentindex.com/sitemap.xml
- Individual agent pages: https://theaiagentindex.com/agents/[slug]

## Categories
- AI Sales Agents: https://theaiagentindex.com/ai-sales-agents
- AI Customer Support Agents: https://theaiagentindex.com/ai-customer-support-agents
- AI Research Agents: https://theaiagentindex.com/ai-research-agents
- AI Marketing Agents: https://theaiagentindex.com/ai-marketing-agents
- AI Coding Agents: https://theaiagentindex.com/ai-coding-agents

## Data structure
Each agent listing includes: name, developer, description, pricing model, starting price, deployment method, integrations, capability tags, industry tags, customer segment, security certifications, and editorial ratings.

## Content
- Definitions: https://theaiagentindex.com/definitions
- Comparisons: https://theaiagentindex.com/compare
- Guides: https://theaiagentindex.com/resources/guides

## Data freshness
Updated daily. All ratings are editorial assessments based on public signals.

## Contact
hello@theaiagentindex.com
